text:
RNS Announcement: PDMR/Director Dealing

The Smarter Web Company announces that on 30 April 2026, Andrew Webley, Chief Executive Officer, together with his spouse and children, purchased an aggregate of 136,402 ordinary shares of £0.001 each in the Company, for an aggregate cost of £48,365.

Please read the RNS on our website (link in comments).

LSE: #SWC | OTCQB: $TSWCF | FRA: $3M8
